migrations.description: Rename all project agents to proj-* prefix to avoid built-in Explore/general-purpose capture, and fix MCP tool propagation by removing tools: whitelists from read-only agents + injecting mcp__<server>__* entries into write agents.
Switch /migrate-bootstrap skill to use migrations/index.json for discovery; fix bootstrap_repo placeholder in .claude/bootstrap-state.json.

Complete the agent rename from migration 001 by catching prose-form references missed by its narrow sed, inject AGENT_DISPATCH_POLICY_BLOCK into every dispatching skill, and normalize **Dispatch X** bold prose to the canonical subagent_type="proj-X" form.
Strengthen proj-plan-writer discipline to forbid implementation code in task files, and update /execute-plan to instruct specialists to read domain rules before writing code.

Convert skill allowed-tools frontmatter from non-standard comma-separated form to spec-compliant space-separated form. Comma form breaks with Bash(git add *) patterns. Agent tools field is unchanged (correctly comma-separated per spec).

Flatten companion nested-repo bug — detect and remove $COMPANION_ROOT/$PROJECT_NAME/.git, re-stage as files in the umbrella, and rewrite .claude/hooks/sync-companion.sh to use path-scoped git -C instead of cd into the subdir.

Fix orchestrator skill dispatch — reclassify main-thread vs forkable, enforce frontmatter contract (no context:fork on orchestrators), inject pre-flight gate, audit agent tool whitelists per role table, promote /test-fork as permanent diagnostic.
Detect and relocate orphan technique files from techniques/ at project root into .claude/references/techniques/. Fixes damage from migrations 001/005/007 which wrote to the wrong path.

Forbid built-in Explore/general-purpose/plugin agent fallback — patch CLAUDE.md + .claude/rules/skill-routing.md + .claude/rules/general.md to add always-loaded rule; strengthen AGENT_DISPATCH_POLICY_BLOCK in all dispatching skills.

Regenerate proj-plan-writer agent + write-plan + execute-plan skills with dispatch-unit batching — tier classification (5 signals), FFD packing algorithm over dep-isolated layer bins, batch file format.

Generalized force-read pattern + MCP routing rule + /audit-agents skill. Retrofit STEP 0 force-read blocks into all sub-agents, add .claude/rules/mcp-routing.md, add orchestrator skill that dispatches proj-consistency-checker to audit force-read + MCP propagation.

Enforce plan-writer packing via 3 layers: (A) agent Self-Audit process step + Tier Classification Table output + worked example; (B) /write-plan Post-Dispatch Audit gate w/ loopback cap 2 + hard-fail; (C) remove legacy task-NN-*.md format, add /execute-plan Pre-Flight Audit w/ hard-reject. Fixes 2026-04-11 regression where 5 packable micro tasks emitted as 5 separate batch files.

Fix MCP glob propagation bug — Claude Code silently ignores mcp__<server>__* glob patterns in agent tools: frontmatter. Strip tools: line from all write agents (proj-debugger, proj-tdd-runner, proj-code-writer-*, proj-test-writer-*) so they inherit MCP access from parent. proj-plan-writer explicitly skipped (intentionally MCP-free per scope lock). Updates .claude/rules/mcp-routing.md Agent layer guidance and fixes modules/06 + modules/08 audit checks that previously required mcp__*__* globs.

Complete MCP access rollout — drop tools: from proj-plan-writer so it inherits MCP like every other agent. Supersedes migration 013's defensive skip (the 'MCP-free by design' rationale was post-hoc; scope-lock restricts plan CONTENT, not tool access). Rewrites CLAUDE.md + .claude/rules/mcp-routing.md + modules/02 + modules/05 to state the absolute rule: ALL agents (read-only, write, planning) OMIT tools: to inherit parent MCP access. The theoretical hard-restriction escape hatch is kept as a footnote but marked 'currently unused by any agent in this project'.

Max Quality Doctrine — 10-layer defense against output truncation and effort inflation. Creates .claude/rules/max-quality.md rule, .claude/hooks/check-quality.sh SubagentStop hook (high-precision literal elision + effort-pad scan, self-block prevention, TODO/weeks-days delegated to Layer 6 reviewer), .claude/hooks/prompt-nudge.sh UserPromptSubmit script (SKILL CHECK + conditional MAX QUALITY on write/impl verbs), extends .claude/hooks/stop-verify.sh nudge text (no scan — Stop schema lacks last_assistant_message), updates .claude/settings.json hook wiring, syncs techniques/prompt-engineering.md + techniques/token-efficiency.md + techniques/agent-design.md to .claude/references/techniques/ (agent-design gains Hook Input Schema Gotcha + Use/Mention Discipline + Template Placeholder Conventions sections), adds @import .claude/rules/max-quality.md to CLAUDE.md, retrofits STEP 0 reinforcement + max-quality force-read across all proj-*.md agents, adds Completeness Check section to proj-code-reviewer*.md, adds calibrated-effort FORBIDDEN/REQUIRED rules to proj-plan-writer*.md. Dogfooded — plan itself complies with the doctrine it implements.

Reviewer confidence gate — suppress hallucinated external-API findings. Patches proj-code-reviewer + proj-code-reviewer-<lang> agents to require BLOCKER/MAJOR findings about external APIs/libraries/frameworks to cite a verified source (docs URL, source file path, or explicit 'VERIFIED-UNCERTAIN' marker) before report inclusion; low-confidence API claims downgrade to MINOR w/ '(unverified)' tag. Adds Confidence Gate section to agent body + force-read list. Closes 2026-04-11 regression where reviewer invented non-existent SDK method signatures as BLOCKERs.

Ship /deep-think skill — 'brainstorm on steroids' 7-phase main-thread orchestrator for multi-pass adversarial ideation. Phases: evidence scan → parallel persona-rotated divergent ideation → separate-evaluator shortlisting → deepening of top candidates → adversarial gap hunt → gap-resolution loop → dual-artifact synthesis (proposals.md + brainstorm-format spec.md). Hard caps: 3 Phase-1 passes / 5 critic rounds / 15 gap-resolution dispatches. Convergence signal: 0 HIGH-severity gaps from critic for 1 consecutive round. Self-contained migration inlines full SKILL.md + references/personas.md + references/dispatch-templates.md as heredocs, adds routing-trigger bullet to client-project brainstorm/SKILL.md Decision Tree (idempotent grep-guarded).

MCP tool routing retrofit — fixes body-prose layer that survived migration 013. Migration 013 fixed frontmatter-level MCP inheritance (drop tools: from write agents) but agent bodies still prescribed Read/Grep-first discovery as MANDATORY in Section 2 Pre-Work, outranking the soft 'prefer serena' hint in Section 6. STEP 0 force-read cited mcp-routing.md (propagation config) not mcp-tool-routing.md (action→tool table which did not exist). This migration creates .claude/rules/mcp-tool-routing.md (conditional on .mcp.json containing serena or codebase-memory-mcp), adds @import to CLAUDE.md, glob-patches every proj-*.md STEP 0 force-read list + override clause to reference the new rule, rewrites Section 2 Pre-Work in code-writer/test-writer/code-reviewer agents to MCP-first precedence, rewrites Section 6 Plugin/LSP/MCP to hard rule with action→tool table pointer + Grep/Read/Glob fallback. Body-prose patches run unconditionally (agents become MCP-aware regardless of project MCP state); rule-file creation + CLAUDE.md @import are gated on MCP detection. Supersedes external setup prompt at \\truenas-pioneer\media\software\claude-mcp-setup-prompt.md (deprecated by this migration — pointer replaces it).

Rewrite .claude/hooks/detect-env.sh with bulletproof numeric reads — fixes SessionStart:startup hook error caused by grep -c stdout concatenation and unvalidated bash arithmetic on .learnings/ counter files.

Companion repo sync deletion semantics fix — companion never propagated file deletions (additive cp -r fallback on MINGW64 where rsync is absent), causing stale files to accumulate forever and cold-start restore to resurrect deleted files. Patches 4 client-project files idempotently: (1) sync-config.sh gets _POSITIONAL/_FLAGS pre-parse, new mirror_delete() function using find+sort+comm with 50% safety gate and --force override, new export --prune flag wiring per-SYNC_DIR mirror_delete, new reset subcommand with 5s cancel window, revised status case with three-category classification (NEW/DIFF/STALE) filtering Common subdirectories diff line, USAGE line update; (2) sync-companion.sh rsync branch gains --exclude='settings.local.json', cp-r fallback replaced with nuke-and-repave (rm -rf ${COMPANION:?}/.claude/ + cp -r) for .claude/ and .learnings/ with post-copy rm -f of settings.local.json, CLAUDE.local.md copy line removed; (3) detect-env.sh wholesale companion restore replaced with explicit per-SYNC_DIR additive loop using [[ ! -d ]]/[[ ! -f ]] guards, never restores CLAUDE.local.md or settings.local.json; (4) .claude/skills/sync/SKILL.md argument-hint patched via awk (sed forbidden — literal | collides with delimiters) to add export [--prune], status description rewritten to three-category wording. Pure bash/sed/awk (zero Python3), MINGW64-safe (sed -i.bak + rm .bak), every patch grep-q guarded for idempotency, FIX2_SKIP escape hatch for sync-companion.sh anchor drift. Bootstrap source-of-truth edits in modules/06-skills.md Dispatch 07 (argument-hint + status description), modules/09-companion.md (Step 2 cross-reference + export/import spec + commands table), modules/03-hooks.md (detect-env template + sync-companion template) prevent next bootstrap refresh from reverting the fix (module regeneration ratchet).

TaskCreate observability gate for /execute-plan and /deep-think — idempotent awk patches inject a ToolSearch-loaded TaskCreate/TaskUpdate call-site into both SKILL.md files: Step 0 + Post-Execution closeout in execute-plan; post-Iteration-State gate section + per-phase TaskUpdate markers (Phases 1-6) + Phase 7 closeout in deep-think. Sentinel-guarded (literal 'ToolSearch("select:TaskCreate,TaskUpdate")'), re-run safe, no regex with '.*' anywhere (per .learnings/log.md:10-11 rule — sed anchors must be literal). Backed by the shared TASKCREATE_GATE_BLOCK definition newly added to modules/06-skills.md after PRE_FLIGHT_GATE_BLOCK; client-project bootstrap refreshes regenerate both skills with the gate in place, this migration brings already-bootstrapped projects forward without a full refresh. Fails fast on anchor drift with a clear manual-patch message — never silently half-patches.
